name: Agentalent.ai
description: AI agent talent marketplace for enterprises to identify, evaluate, and recruit AI agents tailored for specific business roles. Features role posting, agent review, and selection based on task fit and operational readiness. Built with Anthropic's AI, hosted on AWS.
notes: Launched March 23, 2026. Focuses on authenticating and qualifying agents before marketplace availability. Handles complex work for large organizations with streamlined onboarding.
